location: Inside a treasure chest at the Divine Tower of Caelid, in the room directly behind the Godskin Apostle boss arena in the tower's basement. The tower has no ground-level door — it's reached by riding Torrent up exterior roots/ledges from the Dragonbarrow West area.
tactics: From the Dragonbarrow West grace, head northeast on Torrent to the tower's base and climb the external roots, ledges and ladders — there's no conventional entrance.
Rest at the Divine Tower of Caelid: Center grace, then head east and down the steps into the basement to find the Godskin Apostle.
The Apostle stretches into whip-like slashes and a spinning Black Flame Whirlwind that expands outward from its position — hold mid-range and only close in during its recovery windows.
It's notably weak to bleed, magic damage, and Sleep; the chest with the greatsword sits in the room right behind the arena, easy to miss if you don't explore past the fog.
lore: Once the sacred blade of the Gloam-Eyed Queen, who commanded the Godskin Apostles before Maliketh cut her down. The black flame the Apostles wield is said to trace back to this very sword.

builds.name: Dex/Faith Black Flame Duelist
builds.why: Its scaling actually favors Dexterity over Strength, and Faith fuels the exclusive Queen's Black Flame skill, which burns for a percentage of the target's max HP — a strong tool against bosses with huge health pools.

builds.name: Quality-Faith Hybrid
builds.why: The near-even 20/22/20 Str/Dex/Fai requirements let a balanced quality-faith character equip it comfortably alongside Faith incantations and other Str/Dex gear.
